info.name: text-insert
info.text: That theory is on the edge of collapse.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: A theory can be on the edge of collapse.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Theories go atop the foundations of hypotheses.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: That theory has stood the test of time.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Theories can stand the test of time.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: A scientist draws a blueprint before building a house.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: A scientist draws a blueprint before building a house.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: They need blueprints drawn before they can be built.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: We worked hard, and we built that theory from the ground up.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: We worked hard, and we built that theory from the ground up.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: They are built from the ground up.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: Remove just one brick from a building and it all comes crashing to the ground.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Remove just one brick from a building and it all comes crashing to the ground.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: I'll throw a bowling ball down these equations.

info.text: I'll throw a bowling ball down these equations.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: From time to time, you have to examine the foundation.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: If you want one to stand, you need to put it on a rock solid thesis.
